name: The Deliberate Hours
specialty: Expert rift navigators, known for their precision in mapping and clearing the unstable passages of the Undercity.

members.name: Theron Driftsilver
members.note: A man with an eyepatch, his missing eye replaced by a finely crafted mechanical orb.

members.name: Lira Shattershield
members.note: Her thick leather coat, adorned with intricate runes, is rumored to have been forged from the metal of rift-torn realities.

visual: Clad in practical, reinforced leathers and armed with rift-resistant equipment, they move with a cautious yet deliberate grace that sets them apart from other adventurers.
reputation_note: Whispers echo through the Undercity - The Deliberate Hours are a crew to be reckoned with, their precision and efficiency in navigating the city's rifts unmatched, but their mysterious past leaves many wondering who they truly serve.
